title: Port Monitor DLL Persistence
description: Detects registration of port monitor DLLs which run in the context of the Print Spooler service.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Monitors*' and 'Command Line' like '*Driver*' and 'Command Line' like '*reg*' and 'Command Line' like '*add*')))

tests.test_name: Add Port Monitor persistence in Registry
